name: UBA : TGT Ticket Used by Multiple Hosts
notes:
Detects Kerberos TGT ticket being used on two (or more) different computers

Note: The username for Kerberos is Account Name, there is no username in the payload, so use custom property “AccountName (custom)” to match User Account. Before using this rule, make sure you have enabled "Search assets for username, when username is not available on event or flow data" in the UBA Settings page, and rule "UBA : Kerberos Account Map". Or install proper log source extension.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when the source IP is one of the following 127.0.0.1
when the event QID is one of the following (5000937) Success Audit: A Kerberos authentication ticket (TGT) was granted
when any of Account Name (custom) are contained in any of UBA : Kerberos Account Name - AlphaNumeric
when any of Account Name (custom) is the key and any of Source IP is the value in any of UBA : Kerberos Accounts and IPs - AlphaNumeric
TD_list: APPLY UBA : TGT Ticket Used by Multiple Hosts on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND NOT when the source IP is one of the following 127.0.0.1
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000937) Success Audit: A Kerberos authentication ticket (TGT) was granted
AND when any of Account Name (custom) are contained in any of UBA : Kerberos Account Name - AlphaNumeric
AND NOT when any of Account Name (custom) is the key and any of Source IP is the value in any of UBA : Kerberos Accounts and IPs - AlphaNumeric
RED_list: Event name: UBA : TGT Ticket Used by Multiple Hosts
